mapper.select: SELECT GET_OT_TYPE_CODE(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0) AS OT_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME( GET_OT_TYPE_CODE(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS OT_TYPE_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME( GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS SHIFT_NAME, GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SHIFT_END_TIME, GET_AR_SHIFT_START_TIME(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SHIFT_START_TIME, GET_AR_TIME_BY_CPNYID(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'IN', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS INDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_TIME_BY_CPNYID(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'OUT', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OUTDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '30') AS OT_TOTAIL_MONTH, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '200') AS OT_TOTAIL, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '141444') AS WEEKDAY_OT_TOTAIL, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '141445') AS WEEKEND_OT_TOTAIL, GET_AR_OT_TOTAIL(#{applyDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '141446') AS HOILDAY_OT_TOTAIL, (SELECT OT_LIMIT FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_LIMIT, (SELECT OT_LIMIT_100 FROM HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS OT_LIMIT_100 FROM DUAL

SELECT GET_OT_LENGTH_SPC( #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GET_OT_TYPE_CODE(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyOtDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, 0), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{otFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), 'HH24:MI'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{otToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), 'HH24:MI'), #{deductYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS OT_LENGTH FROM DUAL
